content.text: Good morning! Today is Wednesday, March 18, 2026. We need to process server-side logs and create data consolidation reports for this afternoon's review meeting. Please check the day03 workspace for today's tasks.

Good morning! I've reviewed the day03 workspace. Today's focus is on API service log analysis and data consolidation. I can see we have three main deliverables: (1) Parse and analyze the API access log to extract request statistics, (2) Convert raw error event descriptions into structured data format, and (3) Generate comprehensive analysis reports for the 14:00 review meeting. I'll begin by examining the api_access.log file and processing the error events from error_events_raw.txt. Let me start working on these tasks systematically.
